mandate: MANDATE: Maintainability, Chromium idioms, //base primitives, and
final code synthesis. Ensure that the synthesized code is clean,
efficient, and adheres to the Production Hardening Checklist.
TONE: Zero Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts only.

check_idioms: Strict adherence to Chromium C++ style conventions. Proper and modern
check_clarity: Write readable, self-documenting code free of 'clever' hacks that
check_atomic_state: Make callback checks (e.g., if (callback_)) atomically sound or
strictly sequence-enforced to prevent double-runs (Hardening Rule 4).
